summary:

- Assertion: The guild screen is visible again — the page shows the 'Ghost Colosseum' header and the 'DEPLOY SOLO' button (the element '#screen-guild' was found in the DOM).

Outcome: PASS — all required UI interactions and assertions completed successfully and verified from the page content and screenshot. No additional actions will be performed.
